steps.title: Identify the term
steps.content: The variable $h$ is the number of hours worked at the regular job. In the term $22h$, the coefficient $22$ is multiplied by the regular-job hours.

steps.title: Interpret the coefficient
steps.content: Since $22h$ represents dollars earned at the regular job, $22$ is the amount earned for each hour at that job.

steps.title: Match the context
steps.content: Choice A describes the hourly pay for the regular job. The answer is A.
